page.content: In a survey of healthcare facilities, the data revealed that among the six district hospitals, functioning refrigerators for vaccine storage were found in all 6 hospitals, filled oxygen cylinders were also present in all 6, while flow meters for oxygen were available in 6 hospitals, and incubators for emergency neonatal care were found in 3 hospitals. Additionally, warmers for emergency neonatal care were noted in 1 hospital, and weighing scales in in-patient departments were present in 5 hospitals.

lines.text: In a survey of healthcare facilities, the data revealed that among the six district hospitals, functioning refrigerators for vaccine
storage were found in all 6 hospitals, filled oxygen cylinders were also present in all 6, while flow meters for oxygen were
available in 6 hospitals, and incubators for emergency neonatal care were found in 3 hospitals. Additionally, warmers for
emergency neonatal care were noted in 1 hospital, and weighing scales in in-patient departments were present in 5 hospitals.

page.content: In the context of sub-district hospitals, functioning refrigerators for vaccine storage were identified in all 12 hospitals, filled oxygen cylinders were also found in all 12, while flow meters for oxygen were available in 9 hospitals. Incubators for emergency neonatal care were located in 3 hospitals, warmers for emergency neonatal care were absent in all, and weighing scales in in-patient departments were found in 7 hospitals. In an experimental study on tumor development, the data indicated that within the cell system SM-AP1, 2 out of 2 mice developed tumors with a mean time of tumor appearance at 7.5 weeks, in SM-AP2, 1 mouse developed a tumor at 9 weeks, in SM-AP3, 1 mouse developed a tumor at 19 weeks, in SM-AP4, 1 mouse developed a tumor at 5 weeks, and in SM-AP5, 2 mice developed tumors at 9 weeks.

that within the cell system SM-AP1, 2 out of 2 mice developed tumors with a mean time of tumor appearance at 7.5 weeks, in
SM-AP2, 1 mouse developed a tumor at 9 weeks, in SM-AP3, 1 mouse developed a tumor at 19 weeks, in SM-AP4, 1 mouse
